title: Describe an order problem
subtitle: Give order issue details.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: My order arrived, but the size is wrong.
我的订单到了，但尺码错了。
I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。
What is wrong with the order?
I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

items.en: My order arrived, but the size is wrong.
items.zh: 我的订单到了，但尺码错了。

items.en: I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
items.zh: 我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

items.en: What is wrong with the order?
I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
items.zh: 我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What is wrong with the order?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
lines.zh: 我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
lines.zh: 我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

items.en: My order arrived, but the size is wrong.
items.zh: 我的订单到了，但尺码错了。

items.en: I ordered a medium, but I received a large.
items.zh: 我订的是中号，但收到的是大号。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
